title: The Bonded Labour System (Abolition) Act, 1976
full_text: The Bonded Labour System (Abolition) Act, 1976 बंधित श्रम पद्धति (उत्‍सादन) अधिनियम, 1976 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197619 Act Number: 19 Enactment Date: 1976-02-09 Act Year: 1976 Short Title: The Bonded Labour System (Abolition) Act, 1976 Hindi Title: बंधित श्रम पद्धति (उत्‍सादन) अधिनियम, 1976 Long Title: An Act to provide for the abolition of bonded labour system with a view to preventing the economic and physical exploitation of the weaker sections of the people and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment Enforcement Date: 25-10-1975 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Bonded Labour System (Abolition) Act, 1976 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ABOLITION OF BONDED LABOUR SYSTEM CHAPTER III EXTINGUISHMENT OF LIABILITY TO REPAY BONDED DEBT CHAPTER IV IMPLEMENTING AUTHORITIES CHAPTER V VIGILANCE COMMITTEES CHAPTER VI OFFENCES AND PROCEDURE FOR TRIAL CHAPTER VII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Act to have overriding effect. Section 4. Abolition of bonded labour system. Section 5. Agreement, custom, etc., to be void. Section 6. Liability to repay bonded debt to stand extinguished. Section 7. Property of bonded labourer to be freed from mortgage, etc. Section 8. Freed bonded labourer not to be evicted from homestead, etc. Section 9. Creditor not to accept payment against extinguished debt. Section 10. Authorities who may be specified for implementing the provisions of this Act. Section 11. Duty of District Magistrate and other officers to ensure credit. Section 12. Duty of District Magistrate and officers authorised by him. Section 13. Vigilance Committees. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Functions of Vigilance Committees. Section 15. Burden of proof. Section 16. Punishment for enforcement of bonded labour. Section 17. Punishment for advancement of bonded debt. Section 18. Punishment for extracting bonded labour under the bonded labour system. Section 19. Punishment for omission or failure to restore possession of property to bonded labourers. Section 20. Abetment to be an offence. Section 21. Offences to be tried by Executive Magistrates. Section 22. Cognizance of offences. Section 23. Offences by companies. Section 24. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 25. Jurisdiction of civil courts barred. Section 26. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Repeal and saving.
